raw_title: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_en: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_zh: AI炒作及其功能：美联社本地新闻AI倡议的民族志研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究使用民族志方法，调查了美联社本地新闻AI倡议中AI炒作的实际作用和影响。它探讨了AI技术如何被新闻机构采用，以及炒作在推动或阻碍创新中的作用。
plain_summary_en: This study uses ethnographic methods to investigate the actual role and impact of AI hype in the Associated Press's Local News AI Initiative. It explores how AI technology is adopted by news organizations and the role of hype in driving or hindering innovation.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注AI技术在新闻业中的实际应用和影响，特别是炒作现象如何塑造技术采纳和创新过程。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the practical application and impact of AI technology in journalism, particularly how hype shapes the process of technology adoption and innovation.
